description: Fix direct localStorage.length / localStorage.key() access in getSpaceIdFromLocalStorage() that bypasses the SDK's storage utility, causing silent wrong behavior (returns null) in sandboxed iframe contexts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/notion && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace direct localStorage iteration with SDK findLocalStorageEntry() in notion-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/notion/src/notion-api.ts, getSpaceIdFromLocalStorage() at lines 55-70 iterates localStorage directly via `localStorage.length` and `localStorage.key(i)`. This bypasses the SDK's getLocalStorage() wrapper and can fail silently in sandboxed contexts (throwing DOMException, caught by the outer try-catch, returning null). Replace the iteration loop with the SDK's findLocalStorageEntry() utility which provides the same functionality safely.
acceptanceCriteria: The for loop using localStorage.length and localStorage.key(i) is replaced with findLocalStorageEntry()
The function still finds spaceId values matching the UUID pattern
No direct localStorage.length or localStorage.key() access remains in the file
